title: Amtech T1146 70mm 4 Digit Stainless Steel Combination Padlock
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This stainless steel 70mm combination padlock has a 9mm hardened steel shackle and a secure 4 digit combination lock
VERSATILE: It is ideal for securing luggage, suitcases, sports bags, rucksacks, lockers, cupboards, toolboxes, etc
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 70mm 4 DIGIT COMBINATION DISC PADLOCK See more
